personalInfo.name: Kendrick
personalInfo.title: Crypto Ambassador & Community Builder
bio: With over 2 years in the Web3 ecosystem, I have built and grown dozens of crypto communities in Vietnam — from pioneering DeFi projects to groundbreaking Layer-2 solutions. My passion lies in connecting Vietnamese users with high-quality blockchain projects and promoting the adoption of decentralized finance.

As a pioneer in organizing AMAs, Twitter Spaces, and offline events in Ho Chi Minh City , I am proud to have introduced thousands of Vietnamese people to Web3 in a safe and effective way. I am not just an ambassador — I am a community architect.

title.communityLink: Join the Web3 Vietnam community — a place to share knowledge, opportunities, and connections.
title.featuredCarousel: These are some of the key projects I have represented within the Web3 ecosystem.

timeline.title: Began My Web3 Journey
timeline.desc: Discovered Bitcoin and Ethereum, and joined the first Vietnamese crypto communities on Telegram.

timeline.title: First Ambassador Role
timeline.desc: Became an ambassador for my first AI project — Bytenova AI Vietnam Community. Organized my first AMA with 200+ participants.

timeline.title: Content Creator
timeline.desc: Grew my personal Twitter to 10k followers.

timeline.title: Ambassador
timeline.desc: Serving as ambassador for 5 projects simultaneously, specializing in AI Agent and infrastructure. Co-organized Vietnam AMA. Lead Angels VietNam of CoinW.

projects.name: TANSSI Network
activities: Created promotional posts and content on X, Telegram, and Discord
Increased project visibility within the Vietnamese crypto community
projects.description: Promoting TANSSI Network in the Vietnamese market.
